description_long: This is a large, intricately detailed stone sculpture depicting a crucifixion scene. At the top, a figure is affixed to a cross, with arms outstretched and head bowed, representing Jesus Christ. Below the cross, several human figures are gathered, some kneeling and others standing, with expressive gestures and draped garments, likely representing biblical characters such as Mary and other mourners. The sculpture is mounted on a substantial rectangular pedestal with classical architectural detailing, including a recessed panel and decorative scrollwork. The entire piece is rendered in a monochromatic stone material, with visible weathering and fine textural details. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing on the structural support of the cross and the forms of the figures.
description: A large, detailed stone crucifixion sculpture with multiple human figures on a classical pedestal. The scene is expressive and highly textured, with a prominent cross and mourners below.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full crucifixion scene, with Jesus on the cross and several figures below, all details and expressions visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the figures and the cross, with the layered arrangement of the characters and the thickness of the sculpture.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cross and the less-detailed backs of the figures, with the pedestal's rear panel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the sculpture's depth and the arrangement of figures in profile.
attribute_subject_matter: Crucifixion of Jesus Christ with mourners
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate setting.
